scripts.dev: concurrently -n "platform,client,model" -c "blue,green,yellow" "npm run dev:platform" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:model"
scripts.dev:model: bash -c 'cd apps/model-service && source .venv/bin/activate && PORT=$(grep -E "^PORT" .env | tr -d " " | cut -d= -f2) && uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-8000}'
scripts.db:reset: docker compose -f packages/database/docker-compose.yml down -v && npm run db:start && turbo run db:push
